nasb.text: Also it is not good for a person to be without knowledge, And he who hurries his footsteps errs.

esv.text: Desire without knowledge is not good, and whoever makes haste with his feet misses his way.

cnv.text: 一個人沒有知識是不好的， 腳步匆忙的，難免失足。

ccb.text: 热诚却无知不足取， 行动急躁难免有错。

csbs.text: 有热心而无知识，实在不好； 脚步急躁的人，难免失足。
